body:
## Notice:
- Starting from 26.2+, Mojang has introduced the Vulkan rendering engine. If your device does not support **Vulkan 1.2**, you **may** be unable to launch the latest versions of Minecraft

## Updates:
- Synced translations from the [Weblate project](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/)
- Added support for configuring the graphics API within the launcher
- Updated Minecraft version metadata

## Fixes:
- Control layout:
  - Fixed abnormal multiple event triggering for toggle buttons
  - Fixed incorrect handling logic for continuous key events in control layouts
- Fixed issues with input method initialization and delete text event handling
- Fixed issues related to cape handling logic by [youfeng](https://github.com/youfeng11)
- Account management: display default player model when no account is present
